overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a rain-soaked cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit skyscrapers, holographic advertisements, and futuristic architecture. The camera moves from an open plaza through covered walkways and staircases, ascending to an upper level with a massive holographic fish projection.

scene_state.functional_zone: rain-soaked futuristic plaza with palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking through the wet plaza toward the Kang Tao building with neon-lit skyscrapers visible ahead

entered.detail: tall building with illuminated 'Kang Tao' signage near the top
tall palm trees lining the left side of the plaza
towering building with vertical yellow neon light strips
rain-soaked reflective ground surface mirroring the neon lights

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide, rain-soaked futuristic city plaza at night. Tall palm trees line the walkway while the Kang Tao building looms ahead with illuminated signage. A massive skyscraper with vertical yellow neon accents dominates the right side, and the wet asphalt reflects the vibrant city lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under overpass with LED billboards

events.description: moving from open plaza into covered walkway beneath concrete overpass

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass alongside curved walls with large LED screens

entered.detail: large curved LED billboard displaying shifting colors including green, blue, pink and yellow
massive concrete overpass creating a covered walkway
circular regulatory signs mounted on concrete pillars

segments.scene_description: The camera moves from the open plaza into a semi-covered walkway beneath a massive concrete overpass. Large LED screen walls display vibrant shifting colors along the left side, while traffic signs and concrete pillars line the path. The environment transitions from exposed rain to a sheltered underpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark tunnel with illuminated stair ascent

events.description: entering dark tunnel with minimal ambient light and orange directional markers
beginning ascent of concrete stairs through the tunnel

agents.ego_description: climbing concrete stairs through the dimly lit tunnel following orange arrow lights

entered.detail: dark concrete walls enclosing the stairway
illuminated orange directional arrows embedded in the walls
wet concrete staircase ascending through the tunnel

segments.scene_description: The environment shifts to a narrow, dark tunnel with minimal lighting. The camera ascends a concrete stairway illuminated only by orange directional arrow lights embedded in the walls. The space is enclosed and atmospheric, with wet surfaces reflecting the sparse light.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic stairway with blue neon accent lighting

events.description: emerging from dark tunnel into stairway illuminated by cyan blue neon lights
reaching top of stairs and entering upper pedestrian plaza level

agents.ego_description: ascending the stairs illuminated by vibrant blue neon lights toward the upper city level

entered.detail: staircase with bright cyan blue neon strip lighting along the edges

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the dark tunnel, the stairway transforms into a cyberpunk ascent with vibrant cyan blue neon lights illuminating each step. A 'CANT BREATHE' sign becomes visible in the distance as the camera climbs toward the upper city level, transitioning from enclosed darkness to an open upper plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper city plaza with holographic advertisements

events.description: large blue holographic fish materializes and swims through the plaza air

agents.ego_description: walking through the upper plaza observing the holographic fish and towering neon advertisements

entered.detail: large glowing blue holographic koi fish swimming through the air
tall buildings covered in vertical neon advertisements and digital displays

segments.scene_description: The final segment reveals an expansive upper city plaza dominated by a massive holographic blue fish swimming through the air. The Petrochem building stands prominently with illuminated signage, while surrounding skyscrapers display towering vertical advertisements. The wet concrete reflects the neon glow of this high-tech urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rain-soaked city plaza through a series of enclosed passages, eventually ascending to a vibrant upper-level district. It begins in a wide open square where wet asphalt reflects the yellow neon accents of towering skyscrapers and the illuminated signage of the Kang Tao building. As the camera moves forward, the environment transitions from the exposed rain into a sheltered underpass beneath a concrete overpass, flanked by shifting LED screen walls. The scene then shifts into a narrow, dark tunnel where the camera climbs a concrete stairway guided by orange directional lights, before the lighting transforms into vibrant cyan blue neon as the ascent continues toward the upper city. Finally, the camera emerges from the enclosure into an expansive upper plaza dominated by a massive holographic blue fish swimming through the air beside the glowing Petrochem building.
